synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-20936 Important: Oracle Linux 9 sqlite security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-20936

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-20936.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
sqlite-3.34.1-9.el9_7.i686.rpm
sqlite-3.34.1-9.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
sqlite-devel-3.34.1-9.el9_7.i686.rpm
sqlite-devel-3.34.1-9.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
sqlite-libs-3.34.1-9.el9_7.i686.rpm
sqlite-libs-3.34.1-9.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
sqlite-3.34.1-9.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
sqlite-devel-3.34.1-9.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
sqlite-libs-3.34.1-9.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/sqlite-3.34.1-9.el9_7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-6965




Description of changes:

[3.34.1-9]
- Fixes CVE-2025-6965
